name: YES BANK ELITE+ Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: First-year membership fee waived on spending Rs 20,000 within 30 days of card issuance
Renewal fee waiver on spending Rs 2,00,000 in a card anniversary year
additionalBenefits: Card was earlier known as YES Premia
3 complimentary international airport lounge visits per year
2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter
BookMyShow discount up to 25% with monthly cap
Purchase protection cover on eligible electronics
Green fee waiver and complimentary golf lessons at select golf courses

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
